description_long: This is a tall, conical bottle with a cylindrical base and a sharply tapering top, resembling a stylized lighthouse or obelisk. The bottle is predominantly white with hand-painted blue illustrations, including a detailed sailing ship and some cursive script along the side. On one side, the words 'AFTER SHAVING LOTION' are written in blue, with a small yellow star-like accent. The surface appears ceramic or porcelain, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. There are no visible seams or detachable parts, and the cap is integrated into the conical top. The bottle shows minor signs of wear, such as faint discoloration near the base.
description: A tall, white conical bottle with blue ship artwork and 'AFTER SHAVING LOTION' text, made of smooth ceramic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue ship illustration and part of the cursive script on the white bottle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals more of the ship's stern and the continuation of the script, with minimal decoration.
description_view_2: Back view displays the 'AFTER SHAVING LOTION' text in blue and a small yellow accent, with a mostly plain surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the bow of the ship and a mostly undecorated white surface.
attribute_label_or_branding: Blue hand-painted text 'AFTER SHAVING LOTION' on the back, blue ship illustration and cursive script on the side, small yellow accent.
